{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Daughter of Dread
| introduced = cradle-13-threshold
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Daughter of Dread]] is a name [[Kelsa]] considers using for her fighting alias.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Daughter of Dread]] is the announcer's name for [[Kelsa]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
